title: The Mystery Person Leonardo DiCaprio Was Talking to in Viral Golden Globes Clip Remains a Question
text: Leonardo DiCaprio's Viral Golden Globes Moment. At the 2026 Golden Globes, Leonardo DiCaprio was caught on camera during a commercial break appearing to chat playfully with someone off-camera about the animated film KPop Demon Hunters, which won best animated film and best original song. The Mystery: Initially, actress Teyana Taylor—DiCaprio's costar in One Battle After Another—claimed he was teasing her about the film. She explained: I was so happy when they won, because my kids love KPop Demon Hunters. So I was over there just jamming. However, Taylor later walked back these comments on The Tonight Show, admitting she had blacked out for much of the evening and couldn't confirm she was actually the person in the viral clip. She acknowledged remembering conversations about the film with DiCaprio but stated the captured moment was likely with someone else. The identity of who DiCaprio was actually speaking with remains unconfirmed, making the playful exchange a genuine mystery despite Taylor's initial identification. The clip became one of the most talked-about moments from the ceremony on social media.
